notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Henry Davis reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Kyle Karros. Ryan O'Hearn scores. Nick Gonzales scores. Brandon Lowe to 3rd. Henry Davis to 2nd. Interference error by pitcher Jose Quintana.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: catcher Henry Davis picks off Mickey Moniak at 3rd on throw to third baseman Nick Gonzales.
